uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

role.description: The user's role in the application.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: A project created by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

lastModified.description: The timestamp of the last modification.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update.

files.description: A map of file paths to their contents.

messages.description: The chat history for the project.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the project.

isPublic.description: Whether the project is publicly viewable via a share link.

Snapshot.title: Snapshot
Snapshot.description: A snapshot of a project's files at a specific point in time.

id.description: The unique identifier for the snapshot.

projectId.description: The ID of the parent project.

files.description: A map of file paths to their contents at the time of the snapshot.

note.description: An optional note for the snapshot.

TemplateStats.title: TemplateStats
TemplateStats.description: Statistics for a template, such as like counts.

likes.description: The number of likes for the template.

TemplateLike.title: TemplateLike
TemplateLike.description: A record of a user liking a template.

userId.description: The UID of the user who liked the template.

templateId.description: The ID of the template that was liked.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the template was liked.
